title: trisetum glomeratum
intro: Trisetum glomeratum, also known as clustered hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trisetum glomeratum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
